plugins.name: scratch
plugins.description: Fn-level code index MCP server. Splits source files into per-function body files under .scratch/. Token-efficient: open_source returns fn map, read_body loads one fn, search_bodies greps 3000+ fns in ~50 tokens. Each source file gets a persistent scratch note for durable agent memory. One-way watcher re-splits on source change. WASM language modules for any language.
